systemicity: Systemic (nutrient uptake through leaves and roots)
mode_of_action_summary: Balanced NPK fertilizer with high potassium enhances plant strength, improves fruit size and quality, and increases resistance to environmental stress. Nitrogen supports vegetative growth, phosphorus promotes root and flower development, and potassium improves yield, color, and shelf life of produce.

active_ingredients.name: Nitrogen (N)
active_ingredients.mode_of_action: Supports vegetative growth and chlorophyll formation

active_ingredients.name: Potassium (K2O)
active_ingredients.mode_of_action: Improves fruit quality, stress tolerance, and disease resistance

urdu: پھل کا سائز چھوٹا رہ جاتا ہے

application_details.method: Dissolve in water and apply through foliar spray or drip irrigation
application_details.coverage: Ensure uniform coverage for best absorption

resistance_management.advice: Use as part of balanced fertilization program

farmer_benefits: پھل بڑا تے وزنی ہو جاندا اے
فصل دی کوالٹی بہتر ہوندی اے

multilingual_description.english: High potassium water-soluble fertilizer for improving fruit quality and yield.
multilingual_description.urdu: زیادہ پوٹاش والی پانی میں حل ہونے والی کھاد جو پھل کی کوالٹی اور پیداوار بڑھاتی ہے۔
multilingual_description.punjabi: وڈی پوٹاش والی پانی چ حل ہون والی کھاد جو پھل دی کوالٹی تے پیداوار ودھاندی اے۔

embedding_text: Sooraj King 5 15 45 is a water soluble fertilizer containing nitrogen phosphorus and high potassium used for improving fruit size quality and yield in crops. It is applied during flowering and fruit development stages.
